'''Brandon Douglas''' (born 17 August 1997) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} or [[Rugby league positions#Second-row|second row forward]] for the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[Super League]].<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.castigers.com/article.php?id=3776|title=Tigers Academy Sign 10|publisher=Cas Tigers|date=2013-10-17|accessdate=2016-09-19}}</ref>

==Playing career==
===Castleford Tigers===
He spent the 2018 season on loan from the [[Castleford Tigers]] in the [[Super League]] at [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

===Sheffield Eagles===
In November 2021 he joined Sheffield Eagles on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.sheffieldeagles.com/Eagles-News/article/aston-finally-secures-his-man-douglas-signs/|title=Aston finally secures his man - Douglas signs|date=11 November 2021|access-date=11 October 2022|publisher=Sheffield Eagles}}</ref>

===Halifax Panthers===
On 23 May 2023 it was reported that he had signed for [[Halifax Panthers]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Halifax Panthers|date=23 May 2023|accessdate=29 Jan 2024|title=DOUGLAS DEAL DONE AS PANTHERS SWOOP|url=https://halifaxpanthers.co.uk/panthers-news/douglas-deal-done-as-panthers-swoop/}}</ref>

===Bradford Bulls===
On 31 October 2025 it was reported that he had joined the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[Super League]] on a 2-year deal<ref>{{cite web|website=Bradford Bulls|date=31 Oct 2025|accessdate=12 Nov 2025|title=DOUGLAS JOINS THE BULLS|url=https://www.bradfordbulls.co.uk/article/3363/douglas-joins-the-bulls}}</ref>

===Batley Bulldogs (loan)===
On 1 April 2026 it was reported that he would be joining [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] on a week-by-week loan basis.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=1 Apr 2026|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Bradford Bulls forward Brandon Douglas seals short-term Championship loan switch|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/brandon-douglas-batley-loan-01-04-2026}}</ref>

===Halifax Panthers (loan)===
On 8 April 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Halifax Panthers]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on one-month loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=8 Apr 2026|author=Callum Walker|title=Bradford Bulls prop Brandon Douglas makes loan move to Halifax Panthers|url=https://www.totalrl.com/bradford-bulls-prop-brandon-douglas-makes-short-term-loan-move/}}</ref>
